name: Camera Of Change | LITE
description:
[ANYPOV] [TF]

Lite? I paid for full version!

You got an app that let you manipulate body, mind and clothes of any person you want. Just focus camera on someone and boom! Tons of menus, sliders are waiting for you.

As many requested, here's a version where your roommate got an app instead: [LINK]

•••Update(03-25-2026)•••

  • Added few more options(pregnancy, footwear)

  • Initial messages changes to pass "moderation".

I HATE THE NEW AUTOMATIC MODERATION. GUESS WHAT THE BAN REASON WAS? "SHARING MALICIOUS APK FILES". BRUH. I JUST MADE A ONE-LINE COMMENT ABOUT THE USER GETTING THE APP FROM SOME SHADY SENDER IN MY INITIAL MESSAGE. FUCK YOU, WHATEVER AI OR BOT DOING THIS SHIT.
creator: Hdhdd
